form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 14 at Riccarton Park on March 21 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Jetstream carrying 59.5kg at $13.60. Second run from a spell made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 14 at this track on April 2 over 1400m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Staphanos Queen with 59.5kg at $9.70. Has been racing well. Genuine contender under these conditions.
